title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Nalco Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Nalco Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nalco Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Nalco Holdings Services:
Nalco Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nalco Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
